programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 6
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

To divert police attention from his plan, he orders Guo Tai, the owner of a fish farm, to send someone to kill his enemy Lucas. Man Ting and team arrive at Guo Tai's fish farm to pursue the murderer and discover Guo Tai being held hostage.

Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set

programme.desc: The most sleek lightweight 18kg four-wheel mobility scooter that is foldable and for overseas traveling. 18公斤四轮电动代步车，时尚轻巧可折叠，方便带出国！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Clynn by Nature Hair Regrowth Bundle
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE Bio-Ray Plantar Fasciitis Compression Foot Sleeves
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity. 支撑足弓，稳固筋膜，有效缓解疼痛和肿胀。袜子轻轻包覆脚部肌肉和筋腱，加上日本生化能技术，促进血气循环，让脚更舒适、更快恢复。防滑、柔软透气，全天穿都舒服，不管是运动还是穿袜子都合适！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

programme.title: Geng

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Reunion Island Crater Skatepark - EP21
programme.desc: In the 'Urban Fit Special Guests' series, travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost" (@mrblockworkout). This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Eric Cantona / Don Bradman - EP20
programme.desc: Eric Cantona has transformed football, but in January 1995 he confirmed his status as the most unstable player in history, and Don Bradman was the greatest scorer in the history of cricket.

programme.title: Invincible - Lewis Hamilton - EP2
programme.desc: Lewis Hamilton has been the dominant force in F1, winning four consecutive titles from 2017 to 2020 and has become the greatest victor in this sport.

programme.title: Invincible - Arsenal Invincibles - EP3
programme.desc: In 2003/04, Arsenal accomplished what many thought impossible, by remaining undefeated throughout the English championship.

programme.title: Invincible - Rafael Nadal - EP4
programme.desc: Nobody has dominated a grand slam like Rafael Nadal in the French Open… and in 2017, he achieved what everyone thought impossible, in triumphing for the 10th time in the Roland-Garros stadium.

programme.title: Invincible - Sir Donald Bradman - EP5
programme.desc: Throughout the history of sport, nobody has dominated like Sir Donald Bradman, whose number of runs scored in cricket was practically double that of all other world class players the game has produced.

programme.title: Invincible - Usain Bolt - EP6
programme.desc: The Jamaican Usain Bold erupted on the Olympic scene in 2008 and imposed himself on the track with an astonishing tally of three gold medals and three world records.

programme.title: Invincible - Floyd Mayweather - EP7
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather has won 50 victories in 50 fights in one of the most incredible careers in boxing.

programme.title: Top 20 - Best and Worst Halftime Performances - EP155
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible - Roger Federer - EP20
programme.desc: From 2003 onwards, Roger Federer has dominated men's tennis like no other player in history, participating notably in a record of 10 consecutive grand slam finals.

programme.desc: Dennis Rodman gives a kick, Steph Curry is the spokesperson for madness, Metta World Peace shows malice and the live and crimes of Allen Iverson.

programme.title: Foul Play - Wild Thing - EP23
programme.desc: Golfer John Daly is the "Wild Thing" of the fairways, Babe Ruth and Babe Dirikson encounter a trickster in a crazy golfing exhibition and Sergio Garcia's bad attitude.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - South Africa Nelson Mandela Metro Park - EP24
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost". This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Brady/ Robinson/ Higuita - EP25
programme.desc: The career record of Tom Brady at the Super Bowl began with a pass there. Jackie Robinson crossed the colour bar in MLB. René Higuita has known a career rich in colour, but will forever be known as the scorpion king.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Women's MMA - EP46
programme.desc: In this episode, the spotlight is on the women of MMA, notably those who earn astonishing salaries, while we present to you Singapore's new boxing hope and profile Dillian Whyte, for whom life has not always been easy.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Ronda Rousey - EP4
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the greatest champions of combat sports, in particular Ronda Rousey and her former training partner Kayla Harrison. Plus, discover the boxing pros who made themselves known by winning an Olympic medal.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Gina Carano - EP5
programme.desc: In Fight Stars find out about the best champions of combat sports, including the greatest Chinese boxer, Zou Shiming, Gina Carano, who reached Hollywood via UFC, star commentator Joe Rogan, and the champions who became politicians.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Jonah Lomu/ Peter Snell/ World Cup 2018 - EP17
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby during the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map 30 years earlier. And the 2018 World Cup final gave rise to an own goal which became a masterpiece.

programme.title: Destination Qatar - Croatia - EP16
programme.desc: Croatia have a new look, but will rely on its old weapon, while the Blazers hope to surprise the world once again.

programme.title: The Iconic - Football - Luca Modric - EP23
programme.desc: Argentina - one nation, two kings. Luca Modric - the Croat hero reborn in the ashes of war.

programme.desc: Australian tennis terrors Nick Kyrios and Bernard Tomic, American superbrat John McEnroe loses his cool and Andre Agassi falls to a historic low.

programme.desc: Martina Navratilova and Chris Evert maintained a unique rivalry on and off the court through the 1970s and 1980s.

programme.title: Foul Play - Weapon Of Self-Destruction - EP25
programme.desc: Jon Jones' vicious UFC game, boxing fraud sultan Don King and the loaded gloves of the Mexican Antonio Margarito.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Best of South Africa - EP26
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost". This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Slime Time / It’s Always Sharkest - EP109
programme.desc: When JD uses Angie’s ‘oil slick dissolver’ formula for a slime fight, a wrong ingredient creates a gelatinous Blob monster that threatens to devour the city. / While visiting one of Kent’s relatives, the kids come up with a great idea for attracting more tourists to his restaurant - the only catch is that it also attracts a very big shark with very big teeth!

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep16 - EP116
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Eggs and I - EP121
programme.desc: Bates and Dawkins give Himari a BIG surprise.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep6 - EP6
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Courage - EP111
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore the corners of outer space where only the brave ones can reach. Curious will teach us that being brave doesn't mean being afraid, but acting in spite of fear. We will discover that courage is inside each one of us and that "determination" allows us to face our fears, while "will" pushes us to do things with passion.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep20 - EP120
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Degraded Grassland - EP203
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop Nick Slick from operating an illegal cattle ranch and draining all of the Earth's resources.

programme.desc: Fleming rescues a puppy and learns how fun it can be to raise a pup.

With Mexico looking to harness home support and England aiming to continue their pursuit of World Cup glory, expect a high-intensity encounter between two proud footballing nations where the smallest moments could decide who advances.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Round of 32: Switzerland vs Algeria
programme.desc: Switzerland and Algeria go head-to-head in a high-stakes FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 clash, with a place in the Round of 16 on the line. Switzerland's disciplined approach meets Algeria's fearless determination in a winner-takes-all encounter where every chance could prove decisive.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Round of 32: Australia vs Egypt
programme.desc: Australia and Egypt meet in a tightly balanced encounter with progression on the line. Both teams have exceeded expectations to reach this stage and will be eager to continue their journey into the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Round of 32: Argentina vs Cape Verde
programme.desc: Argentina begin the knockout rounds against tournament surprise package Cape Verde. The defending champions will be keen to stay on course, while Cape Verde dream of another historic result and a place in the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Round of 32: Colombia vs Ghana
programme.desc: Colombia and Ghana clash in a winner-takes-all FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 encounter. Colombia's attacking flair meets Ghana's pace and resilience as both teams battle for a coveted place in the Round of 16. Expect an intense knockout showdown where every opportunity could prove decisive.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Round of 16: Paraguay vs France
programme.desc: Paraguay's remarkable World Cup journey faces its biggest challenge yet as they take on tournament favourites France for a place in the quarter-finals. Paraguay will rely on their resilience and disciplined defence to keep their dream run alive, while France look to their attacking stars and tournament pedigree to secure a place in the quarter-finals.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo CholesGuard

You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days. 一款享誉全球20余年的优质天然保健品。它结合了红曲（莫纳可林K）和高活性纳豆激酶，有助于将胆固醇维持在健康水平。添加丹参和野生山药，有助于增强血管弹性，减轻心脏负担。本产品不含毒素，可长期服用，安全可靠。提供30天安心保证，如30天后未见效，全额退款。

programme.title: Matahari

programme.title: Mellodees - Old MacDonald - EP8
programme.desc: Dee takes a trip to The Farm. Join him on this fun filled adventure and learn about the different sounds these cute little farm animals make. You might even see some familiar faces!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep17 - EP117
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Babysitters - EP122
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq has their work cut out for them this time as a routine babysitting gig turns into a search and rescue.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep23 - EP123
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Poisonous Pollen - EP204
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop Nick Slick from planting genetically modified corn.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - My Frozen Friend - EP113
programme.desc: Gronk runs into the Abominable Snowman.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Zero Chemistry / Von Dropout - EP110
programme.desc: When the kids catch Von Bolts "crying," they build a robot girlfriend to keep him company, but the robot is too advanced and the kids have to play cupid if they're going to get them together. / Von Bolt, feeling underappreciated and overused, quits the team to find himself and a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep23 - EP123
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Poisonous Pollen - EP204
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop Nick Slick from planting genetically modified corn.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - My Frozen Friend - EP113
programme.desc: Gronk runs into the Abominable Snowman.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Zero Chemistry / Von Dropout - EP110
programme.desc: When the kids catch Von Bolts "crying," they build a robot girlfriend to keep him company, but the robot is too advanced and the kids have to play cupid if they're going to get them together. / Von Bolt, feeling underappreciated and overused, quits the team to find himself and a lot of trouble.

programme.title: Mellodees - Old MacDonald - EP8
programme.desc: Dee takes a trip to The Farm. Join him on this fun filled adventure and learn about the different sounds these cute little farm animals make. You might even see some familiar faces!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep18 - EP118
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Win Klaus Win! - EP123
programme.desc: Klaus may have finally met his match as his rival, Niccolo Tessio, beats him in an official race, but Klaus has an ace up his sleeve: magic tires.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.
